pi_items.metadata_value: Data represents real music store scenario
pi_items.verified_value: Data is real (public sample database) - not synthetic. Chinook is a well-known sample database for SQL learning with real music genres, artists, tracks, and customer/invoice data.
pi_items.source: Verified against Chinook documentation at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database - it's a real, publicly distributed sample database

privileged_info_summary: The genre_revenue_queries task uses the Chinook database, a real, public music store sample database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. The database contains real tables (Genre, Track, InvoiceLine, Invoice, Customer) with real music industry data including 25 genres (including Rock, Jazz, Classical, Pop), 3503 tracks, 2240 invoice lines from 59 customers across 412 invoices. The task requires the agent to create two SQL queries (GenreRevenue and CountryRevenue), a new RevenueTarget table with 4+ rows, and a Revenue Analysis report in the chinook.odb file located at /home/ga/chinook.odb. All referenced table names, columns, and genres have been independently verified against the actual Chinook SQLite database.
